hero.subtitle: One app for MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, and Redis. Multi-tab SQL editor, built-in SSH terminal, blazing-fast data grid, and 30+ keyboard shortcuts - starts in under 2 seconds.

whatsNew.testConnDesc: Ping through SSH tunnel before saving

features.subtitle: No bloat. No waiting around. A fast, native app that launches instantly and stays out of your way.
features.hoodSubtitle: Every detail crafted to keep you in the flow.

sqlEditor.title: Pro-grade SQL editor
sqlEditor.desc: Multiple query tabs per database, schema-aware autocomplete, multi-statement execution, SQL formatter, query variables with :placeholders, EXPLAIN visualizer, and saved snippets per engine.

dataGrid.title: Blazing-fast data grid
dataGrid.desc: Virtual-scrolled grid that renders millions of rows at 60fps. Inline editing, drag-to-select, sticky columns, column stats, row comparison, and copy-paste.

ssh.title: SSH tunnel & terminal
ssh.desc: Connect to remote databases through SSH tunnels with password or key auth. Plus a built-in SSH terminal - multi-tab sessions, keepalive, auto-reconnect, and saved credentials.

security.title: Secure by default
security.desc: OS keychain credential storage, SSL/TLS with custom certificates, built-in data masking to auto-hide PII columns like email and passwords. Zero passwords on disk.

keyboard.title: Keyboard-first workflow
keyboard.desc: 36 keyboard shortcuts, command palette, multi-connection tabs, query tabs with Cmd+T/W, session restore - hands never leave the keyboard.

engines.title: 4 engines, one app
engines.desc: MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, and Redis with unified UI. Schema diff, foreign key viewer, and engine-specific query support built in.

export.title: Import & export everything
export.desc: Export to CSV, JSON, SQL. Import CSV with column mapping. Copy rows as PHP, Python, Go, Ruby, YAML. Full database backup & restore.

metrics.title: Metrics Board
metrics.desc: Write SQL, pick a chart type, and see live visualizations on a dashboard. Multiple layouts, full-screen detail view, and export to PDF - your data, always up to date.

sqlEditor.title: SQL Editor
sqlEditor.desc: A full IDE-grade editor right in your database client

dbTools.title: Database Tools
dbTools.desc: Everything you need to manage your database
items: Full-screen chart detail with data table

importExport.title: Import & Export
importExport.desc: Move data in and out effortlessly
items: Export as CSV, JSON, SQL or PDF
Import from CSV with column mapping
Copy rows as PHP, Python, Go, Ruby, YAML

connections.title: SSH & Connections
connections.desc: Connect securely to any database, anywhere - with built-in SSH
items: SSH tunnel for MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis
Save SSH sessions with grouping & color

comparison.headline: Less is more
comparison.subtitle: Full-featured doesn't mean heavy. Dibiku packs a multi-tab SQL editor, SSH terminal, data grid, metrics board, and more - while using a fraction of the resources.
comparison.memoryNote: Measured idle with one connection open
comparison.taglineAfter: - no hidden bloat eating your resources.

pricing.headline: Free and open
pricing.subtitle: Everything you need to work with your databases - no strings attached.
pricing.desc: All features included - no limits, no account required

download.headline: Try it now - it's free
download.subtitle: Download, install, and connect to your first database in under 30 seconds. No account required.
download.note: Works on both Apple Silicon and Intel Macs
download.macWarningText: If macOS says the app "is damaged", open Terminal and run:
download.macWarningNote: This removes the download quarantine flag. Required for apps not yet notarized by Apple.

footer.tagline: The fast, lightweight database client for MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, and Redis.

about.intro: Dibiku is an independent, bootstrapped project - built by a solo developer who got tired of slow, bloated database tools.
about.storyP1: Every database client I tried felt like it was fighting me - heavy apps eating 1GB of RAM, 10-second startup times, clunky UIs that need a mouse for everything. I wanted something that starts instantly, stays lightweight, and lets me work with my keyboard.
about.storyP2: So I built Dibiku. A native desktop app that connects to MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, and Redis - with a built-in SSH terminal, multi-tab SQL editor, virtual-scrolled data grid, and 36+ keyboard shortcuts. All in under 80MB of memory.
about.speedDesc: Under 2 seconds to start. 60fps scrolling through 100K rows. Every interaction should feel instant.
about.keyboardFirstDesc: 36+ shortcuts so your hands never leave the keyboard. Cmd+T for new tab, Cmd+Enter to run, Cmd+K to switch databases.
about.noBloatDesc: ~80MB RAM, no bundled browser engine, no telemetry, no account required. Just a tool that does its job.
about.secureDesc: Credentials stay in your OS keychain. SSH tunnels for remote access. Data masking for sensitive columns. Zero passwords on disk.
about.contactDesc: Questions, feedback, or feature requests? I'd love to hear from you.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.subtitle: {count} shortcuts to keep your hands on the keyboard
shortcuts.tip1: Press ⌘+? inside Dibiku to open the shortcuts cheat sheet.
shortcuts.tip3: Use ⌘+P to open the command palette for quick navigation.
